title: 新智壳--四个新智壳的评测

"比较优秀","bold":true},{"text":"的"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":4},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"技能"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"GY5X18sytdJusLlT","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_445/h_262/50364/640664/2025/8/20/718234.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"445px","height":"262px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"抵抗任意减益效果","bold":true},{"text":"，都会"},{"text":"增加自身20%行动条","bold":true},{"text":"，"},{"text":"如果一回合内抵抗两个Debuff也只能触发一次","bold":true}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":4},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"角色推荐"}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":4},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"凌罗"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"Kf5qWoFv4ZfzjPHE","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_865/h_639/50364/640664/2025/8/20/995942.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"647px","height":"478px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凌罗的大招可以为"},{"text":"队友附加免疫","bold":true},{"text":"并"},{"text":"解除控制","bold":true},{"text":"，配合抗性也可以"},{"text":"多次触发拉条来帮队友摆脱控制","bold":true},{"text":"，改变局面"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVE","bold":true},{"text":"："},{"text":"更推荐超新星","bold":true},{"text":"或者"},{"text":"最强音","bold":true},{"text":"来提高奶量"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVP","bold":true},{"text":": "},{"text":"抗性队伍","bold":true},{"text":"强烈推荐带死神脚步，"},{"text":"核心带两抗性一生命","bold":true},{"text":"，控制队伍的噩梦"}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":4},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"多琪"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"eAiiaJ4EE4QhJoTZ","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_865/h_584/50364/640664/2025/8/20/987265.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"623px","height":"421px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"本来多琪就是"},{"text":"最佳的解控手","bold":true},{"text":"，配合死神脚步更能提升其解控能力，一但对面控制不住多琪，触发了死神脚步，那"},{"text":"抢到2速的多琪就","bold":true},{"text":"可以解放大部分队友。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVE","bold":true},{"text":":更推荐如胡狼，万魔等智壳来提高出手频率"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVP","bold":true},{"text":":抗性多琪抵抗插队，配合浴血，对面会非常难受。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":4},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"维罗妮卡"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"XlBONL5LGl8HkVtA","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_865/h_633/50364/640664/2025/8/20/986896.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"643px","height":"471px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"非常适合"},{"text":"拉条类的智壳","bold":true},{"text":"，前提是"},{"text":"队友能够协同","bold":true},{"text":"，才有用处，否则自己拉上来，但是队友都被控制，那就非常难受了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVE","bold":true},{"text":":不是很常见，有更好的辅助角色"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVP","bold":true},{"text":":带上奋进矩阵的死神脚步，一旦触发，就会拉条35+20+10=65%的行动条，基本上只要抵抗了，就能"},{"text":"抢到2速","bold":true},{"text":"。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":4},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"彼安汀"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"SL9Q60HFXIRdBsTZ","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_865/h_617/50364/640664/2025/8/20/55429.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"667px","height":"476px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"携带死神脚步的彼岸汀，可以抢二速插队，并且不担心队友阵亡，拉起已经阵亡的队友往往能一转颓势。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVE","bold":true},{"text":"：更适合"},{"text":"万魔等减CD智壳","bold":true},{"text":"。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVP","bold":true},{"text":":"},{"text":" 浴血+奋进","bold":true},{"text":"，浴血保证生存，奋进配合死神脚步保证出手，核心选择两抗性一生命。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":4},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"善雅"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"8wTsaxvD86GFS6CM","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_865/h_625/50364/640664/2025/8/20/74450.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"668px","height":"483px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"非常契合死神脚步的拉条效果，可以"},{"text":"更加频繁出手来抬高队友血量","bold":true},{"text":"。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVE","bold":true},{"text":"：更推荐"},{"text":"超新星","bold":true},{"text":"或者"},{"text":"最强音","bold":true},{"text":"来提高奶量"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVP","bold":true},{"text":":推荐死神脚步，核心带两抗性一生命，善雅需要队友协同才可以发挥（比如缇亚马特），毕竟"},{"text":"只能加血不能为队友提供其他增益","bold":true},{"text":"，"},{"text":"很容易被控制到死","bold":true},{"text":"。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":4},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"PVP评价"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"kizgE4ThuZyw7rsk","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_865/h_578/50364/640664/2025/8/20/5104.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"719px","height":"480px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"非常强力的PVP智壳","bold":true},{"text":"，可以提高"},{"text":"抗性队伍","bold":true},{"text":"的整体强度，矩阵也非常适配一些辅助角色，属于"},{"text":"反核","bold":true},{"text":"，"},{"text":"反控制","bold":true},{"text":"的强力智壳。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":7},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"新智壳-噬身之蛇"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"","color":"#5991FF"},{"type":"image","key":"jpzvk4aU4qAFpTLC","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_661/h_831/50364/640664/2025/8/20/554691.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"474px","height":"596px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"前言：长线智壳，厚积薄发","bold":true,"color":"#5991FF"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":4},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"基础属性"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"d4NZgyiVjsEhcS2W","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_523/h_148/50364/640664/2025/8/20/406168.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"523px","height":"148px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"397的防御力与3576的生命值中规中矩","bold":true},{"text":"，无突出的地方"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":4},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"技能"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"N98Jac2xF6Exwy9C","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_447/h_233/50364/640664/2025/8/20/876773.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"447px","height":"233px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"行动前，自身生命高于70%，会提高自身6%伤害和6点速度，最高7次，叠满了总共提升42%的增伤和42点速度"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":4},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"角色推荐"}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"莉莉斯"}]},{"type":"heading","info":{"level":2},"fallback":{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"莉莉斯"}]},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"z4odtqsmWt5OFajs","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_865/h_635/50364/640664/2025/8/20/760631.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"865px","height":"635px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"heading","info":{"level":2},"fallback":{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"莉莉斯"}]},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"额外回合可以"},{"text":"触发两次智壳","bold":true},{"text":"，叠加12%的伤害和12%的速度，使得"},{"text":"快速叠满","bold":true},{"text":"成为可能。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVE","bold":true},{"text":":少见，有更好的上位替代"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVP","bold":true},{"text":":多次行动的角色都比较适配噬身之蛇智壳，莉莉斯"},{"text":"生命增伤并且带控制","bold":true},{"text":"，随着时间增加，伤害和速度会逐渐提高，给对方带来不小的压力。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":4},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"水月真"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"3gGVT6sZ3ZDRf7t7","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_865/h_672/50364/640664/2025/8/20/569895.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"635px","height":"493px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"开局"},{"text":"自带反击","bold":true},{"text":"，让很多人"},{"text":"不敢第一时间集火她","bold":true},{"text":"，这让水月真有"},{"text":"更大的机会叠起来伤害","bold":true},{"text":"，等对方想反制时，面对已经"},{"text":"叠满层数","bold":true},{"text":"的水月真，就变非常棘手了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVE","bold":true},{"text":":一些高难度本可以使用，通过浴血生存下来并"},{"text":"慢慢的叠加被动","bold":true},{"text":"击杀boss"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"PVP:","bold":true},{"text":"只要让水月真叠加了几个回合的增伤，反击伤害就会非常恐怖。"}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":4},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"header4","children":[{"text":"PVP评价"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"并不是很强力的智壳","bold":true},{"text":"，叠加的"},{"text":"70%生命限制其实比较苛刻","bold":true},{"text":"，面对高速队伍，对方一轮输出"},{"text":"很容易就让己方叠不起来层数。","bold":true}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但是在"},{"text":"肉队内战中会比较强势","bold":true},{"text":"。"}]},{"type":"horizontal-rule","info":{"id":7},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"divider","value":"line-3","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"今天的测评就到这里啦~我是鲸鱼喵~有什么问题，欢迎大家在评论区讨论~","color":"#5991FF"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"","color":"#5991FF"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"您的点赞支持就是对我最大的鼓励！","color":"#5991FF"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","id":"hE4P2D","info":{"url":"https://img2.tapimg.com/moment/etag/FkMUbczRTw56ZuSAtubZhEJHngVJ_20250919211058.png?imageMogr2/thumbnail/1080x9999%3E/quality/80/format/jpg/interlace/1/meta-keep-list/VXNlckNvbW1lbnQ%3D/ignore-error/1&t=1","description":""},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","id":"6YkFUp","info":{"url":"https://img2.tapimg.com/moment/etag/Ft31EtOjoS0CvPD3IEdigvHIPITL_20250919211158.png?imageMogr2/thumbnail/1080x9999%3E/quality/80/format/jpg/interlace/1/meta-keep-list/VXNlckNvbW1lbnQ%3D/ignore-error/1&t=1","description":""},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","id":"or5uRF","info":{"url":"https://img2.tapimg.com/moment/etag/FpqviMw4c3KOwtO9e9ucO0IPA-Lb_2025091921
